'''Sann Dekker''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Security guard/Legends|guard]] who lived in [[Desolation Alley]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted dead for 2,000 credits by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] for being an extortionist. His bounty was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] who killed the man.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
